docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SEVICE $ 45.00- SERVED AUG-08-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MEDIA ALLIANCE
CORRESPONDENCE CORRESPONDENCE FROM PLAINTIFF RE OUTSTANDING DEBT OWED IS LODGED IN FILE RECEIVED BY PLAINTIFF JUHASZ, ANTONIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JUHASZ, ANTONIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEDIA ALLIANCE $8,269.00 PRINCIPAL, $120.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,389.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,264.00 FILED BY JUHASZ, ANTONIA AS TO DEFENDANT MEDIA ALLIANCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-19-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-19-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-19-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ANTONIA JUHASZ. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MEDIA ALLIANCE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-19-2016 - JUDGMENT.
